import io
import string
import list

fn parse_ints(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut i = 0
  mut started = false
  mut has_digit = false
  mut sign = 1
  mut acc = 0
  while i < n
    mut c = 0
    match string.byte_at(s, i)
    when Some(v)
      c = v
    when None
      c = 0
    end
    let is_digit = c >= 48 and c <= 57
    let is_minus = c == 45
    if is_digit
      started = true
      has_digit = true
      acc = acc * 10 + (c - 48)
    else if is_minus and not started
      started = true
      sign = -1
    else
      if has_digit
        result = list.push(result, sign * acc)
      end
      started = false
      has_digit = false
      sign = 1
      acc = 0
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if has_digit
    result = list.push(result, sign * acc)
  end
  result
end

fn read_one() -> String
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
end

let line1 = read_one()
let line2 = read_one()
let a = parse_ints(line1)
let b = parse_ints(line2)
let n = a.len()
mut k = 0
while k < n
  mut x = 0
  match a.get(k)
  when Some(v)
    x = v
  when None
    x = 0
  end
  mut y = 0
  match b.get(k)
  when Some(v)
    y = v
  when None
    y = 0
  end
  let s = x + y
  println("#{x}+#{y}=#{s}")
  k = k + 1
end
